title: LoRa gateway node benchmark fixture
representative_intent: ESP32 LoRa gateway with RF front-end, antenna keepout and power filtering

requirements.text: Represent LoRa RF front-end, antenna connector/keepout and RF non-claims evidence.
Provide ESP32 gateway power filtering, rail current and decoupling review evidence.
Track digital/RF partitioning, return-path and SI/PI review evidence.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, RF/SI/PI, current budget and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not RF certification or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim antenna performance, LoRaWAN certification, regulatory compliance, manufacturability or production readiness.
